title: Orient Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Orient Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
